data.title: Download Sample PDF Files for Testing, Development & Demo | Free PDF Downloads
data.text:
Download Sample PDF Files

Welcome to our collection of sample PDF (Portable Document Format) files. These files are perfect for testing, development, and educational purposes. Whether you’re a developer, tester, or educator, our diverse range of PDF samples will meet your needs.

Why Use Our Sample PDF Files?
High-quality, diverse content for all your PDF testing needs
Various file sizes and complexities to simulate real-world scenarios
100% free to download and use
Ideal for testing PDF readers, development, and learning
Available Sample PDF Files for Download
1. Basic Text Document (basic-text.pdf)

Size: 72.9 KB
Pages: 1
Description: A simple one-page document with basic text formatting. Perfect for testing PDF readers and basic PDF handling.

Download Basic Text PDF

2. Multi-Page Report (sample-report.pdf)

Size: 2.39 MB
Pages: 10
Description: A multi-page report with text, images, and tables. Ideal for testing pagination and complex layout rendering.

Download Multi-Page Report PDF

3. Sample PDF with Images (image-doc.pdf)

Size: 7.97 MB
Pages: 6
Description: Document with high-resolution images. Great for testing image extraction and PDF optimization techniques.

Download Image-Heavy PDF

4. Fillable Form (fillable-form.pdf)

Size: 52.7 KB
Pages: 2
Description: An interactive PDF form with various field types. Perfect for testing form filling and data extraction.

Download Fillable Form PDF

5. Large Document (large-doc.pdf)

Size: 36.8 MB
Pages: 100
Description: A large, content-rich document. Ideal for testing PDF loading times and memory handling.

Download Large PDF Document

6. Password Protected PDF (protected.pdf)

Size: 4.75 KB
Pages: 3
Description: A password-protected PDF for testing security features. Password: “samplefiles”

Download Protected PDF

7. PDF Example for Developers (dev-example.pdf)

Size: 690 KB
Pages: 6
Description: A specially crafted PDF showcasing various PDF features. Ideal for developers learning PDF manipulation.

Download Developer Example PDF

8. More PDF Samples
Download Sample PDF	Size
Download 65KB Sample PDF	64.6 KB
Download A4 Size PDF	151 KB
Download Letter Size PDF	151 KB
Download Legal Size PDF	155 KB
Download 5-Page PDF	120 KB
Download 10-Page PDF	2 MB
Download Text Only PDF	100 KB
How to Use These Sample PDF Files
Click the “Download” button next to the file you need.
Save the PDF file to your local device.
Use the PDF in your projects, applications, or for testing purposes.
Experiment with different PDF readers, converters, or manipulation tools.

Note: While these PDF files are free to download and use for testing and development, please do not use them for commercial purposes without proper attribution.

Need More PDF Samples?

Can’t find what you’re looking for? Check out our other sample file formats or contact us if you need a specific type of PDF file not listed here.

FAQs about Sample PDF Files
Are these PDF files truly free to download?

Yes, all our sample PDF files are completely free to download and use for testing and development purposes.

Can I modify these PDF files?
Are these PDFs virus-free and safe to download?

data.summary: A collection of free sample PDF files for testing, development, and educational purposes.
data.tldr: This page offers a variety of free sample PDF files for developers, testers, and educators to download and use. The collection includes basic text documents, multi-page reports, image-heavy PDFs, fillable forms, and password-protected files, catering to different testing scenarios. All files are free for non-commercial use and come in various sizes and complexities.
keyFacts: Provides free downloadable sample PDF files for testing and development.
Includes basic, multi-page, image-heavy, fillable, and password-protected PDFs.
Files are available in various sizes, from small text docs to large 100-page documents.
Intended for developers, testers, and educators for non-commercial use.

meta.description: Access a variety of free sample PDF files for testing, development, and demo purposes. Download PDF documents, templates, and examples for your projects. Try them now!
meta.ogTitle: Download Sample PDF Files for Testing, Development & Demo | Free PDF Downloads

The Man Setting Fire to the GOP
Tucker Carlson stages a stunt at Ben Gurion Airport, flirts with antisemitic conspiracies, and still gets invited to lunch at the White House. The real question is why the president keeps indulging him.
BYLEE SMITH

While audiences are eagerly awaiting broadcast of the conversation between U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee and Tucker Carlson, the podcaster has already scored a decisive win. Carlson and his team leaked to a friendly reporter that after the interview with Huckabee at Ben Gurion Airport, Israeli airport authorities detained and harassed them. According to Carlson, “Men who identified themselves as airport security took our passports, hauled our executive producer into a side room, and then demanded to know what we spoke to Ambassador Huckabee about.”

Continue reading →︎

data.summary: Tablet Magazine's news section covers Jewish culture, politics, antisemitism, and current events.
data.tldr: Tablet Magazine's news section features articles on Jewish culture, U.S. and Israeli politics, and antisemitism, with contributions from notable writers. Recent pieces discuss Tucker Carlson's visit to Israel, Black-Jewish relations, and rising antisemitism in Europe. The section provides timely commentary and analysis relevant to Jewish communities worldwide.
keyFacts: Tucker Carlson's visit to Israel and subsequent controversy is a featured story.
Articles address ongoing issues of antisemitism in the U.S. and Europe.
Contributors include prominent journalists and public figures discussing Jewish culture and politics.

meta.description: Read about Jewish news and Jewish culture at Tablet Magazine, your daily online magazine for all things related to the Jewish community.
meta.ogTitle: Jewish News - Jewish Culture | Tablet Magazine

AD
Getting started is simple. We'll give you everything you need to learn to code. Learn in-demand coding skills for free with Codecademy.

50% off Pro Annual Plan
•
Code LEARNMARCH26
•

data.summary: Codecademy offers a free online course to learn regex and coding fundamentals.
data.tldr: Codecademy provides a free resource for learning regular expressions (regex) as part of its coding curriculum. The platform is currently offering a 50% discount on its Pro Annual Plan with the code LEARNMARCH26, valid from March 10 to March 19. The course is designed for beginners seeking in-demand coding skills.
keyFacts: Codecademy offers a free regex learning course.
A 50% discount on the Pro Annual Plan is available with code LEARNMARCH26.
The discount is valid from March 10 to March 19.
